name: vistr-tavern
description: AI ensemble narrative disturbance extension for SillyTavern.

scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check core/narrativeMemory.js && node --check core/exportWriter.js && node --check ui/uiOverlay.js && node --check data/version.js && node --check scripts/smoke-test.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-version.mjs && node --check scripts/create-package.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run smoke && npm run verify:version
